startPoint.en: Talk to any of the three TzHaar at the collapsed tunnel in the south-east corridor of TzHaar City.
startPoint.es: Habla con cualquiera de los tres TzHaar en el túnel derrumbado del corredor sureste de TzHaar City.

items.name: Adamant pickaxe
items.display: Adamant pickaxe or better (tool belt will work for the mines, but will only work for the fight if you already have a melee weapon equipped. Otherwise, bring a separate pickaxe for the fight)

items.name: Runes
items.display: A main-hand magic weapon and runes for water spells, or a necromancy weapon

items.name: A ranged weapon (the final lava monster can only be damaged with ranged)
items.display: A ranged weapon (the final lava monster can only be damaged with ranged)

items.name: A melee weapon (for faster breaking of the TokTz-Ket-Dill armour)
items.display: A melee weapon (for faster breaking of the TokTz-Ket-Dill armour)

items.name: Necromancy
items.display: A necromancy weapon can be used to kill the fire and lava monsters. Cannot use necromancy for the last lava monster and the TokTz-Ket-Dill

recommended.name: Portent of restoration
recommended.display: Food for the final fight (portent of restoration does not work)

recommended.name: Varrock armour
recommended.display: Varrock armour for mining the obsidian

recommended.name: Varrock
recommended.display: Transportation to Varrock for quick access to the Varrock Palace library

recommended.name: TokKul-Zo
recommended.display: TokKul-Zo for quick teleportation around TzHaar City

recommended.name: There are several banks in the city, so you do not need to bring all the items in the backpack.
recommended.display: There are several banks in the city, so you do not need to bring all the items in the backpack.

children.name: Plank box
children.display: A plank box can be used to carry the oak planks before being treated

rewards.name: TokTz-Ket-Dill mine
rewards.display: Access to the TokTz-Ket-Dill mine with 1 silver rock, 8 coal rocks, 3 mithril rocks and 2 adamantite rocks (access is obtained after reaching the third dungeon; you don't have to kill the TokTz-Ket-Dill).

rewards.name: Stone slab
rewards.display: Ability to mine stone slabs (unsmithable obsidian) in the TzHaar obsidian mine

rewards.name: TzHaar-Hur-Brekt
rewards.display: The possibility of watching TzHaar-Hur-Brekt's play

text.en: 2 empty inventory slots
text.es: 2 espacios vacíos en el inventario

text.en: After entering the TzHaar City, go east as far as possible along the southern wall, then directly north (just west of Fight Cauldron teleport). Speak to one of the three guards.
text.es: Después de entrar en TzHaar City, ve hacia el este todo lo posible siguiendo la pared sur, y luego directamente al norte (justo al oeste del teletransporte de Fight Cauldron). Habla con uno de los tres guardias.

text.en: Talk to TzHaar-Ket-Grol south-west, at the crack in the wall (with at least one empty inventory slot).
text.es: Habla con TzHaar-Ket-Grol al suroeste, en la grieta de la pared (con al menos un espacio vacío en el inventario).

chatOptions: 1 I was told to talk to you

text.en: Enter the tunnel to the library north-west of the Main Plaza.
text.es: Entra en el túnel hacia la biblioteca al noroeste de la Main Plaza.

text.en: Speak to TzHaar-Mej-Lor.
text.es: Habla con TzHaar-Mej-Lor.

chatOptions: 1 I need help with the TzHaar language.

text.en: Talk to Reldo in the Varrock library about TzHaar language.
text.es: Habla con Reldo en la biblioteca de Varrock sobre el idioma TzHaar.

chatOptions: 3 I have a question about the TzHaar language.

text.en: Along the west wall, in the cluster of 3 bookcases, search the middle one for the TzHaar Tourist Guide.
text.es: A lo largo de la pared oeste, en el grupo de 3 estanterías, busca en la del medio la TzHaar Tourist Guide.

text.en: Read the TzHaar Tourist Guide along with the note inside.
text.es: Lee la TzHaar Tourist Guide junto con la nota que contiene.

text.en: Return to TzHaar-Ket-Grol.
text.es: Vuelve con TzHaar-Ket-Grol.

chatOptions: 1 I know what to bring now.

text.en: Go east and pass the cave entrance.
text.es: Ve hacia el este y pasa la entrada de la cueva.

text.en: Enter the mine directly east and speak with TzHaar-Hur-Brekt on the east side , then talk again.
text.es: Entra en la mina directamente al este y habla con TzHaar-Hur-Brekt en el lado este, luego habla de nuevo.

chatOptions: 2 Can you teach me magma mining?

text.en: Speak to TzHaar-Hur-Klag on the west wall.
text.es: Habla con TzHaar-Hur-Klag en la pared oeste.

chatOptions: 3 How can I make the story better?
2 TzHaar who gets assaulted in its home is TzHaar-Hur.

text.en: Speak to TzHaar-Mej-Kol, just north.
text.es: Habla con TzHaar-Mej-Kol, justo al norte.

chatOptions: 3 How can I make the story better?
2 One is a TzHaar-Mej who is aware of the situation.

text.en: Speak to TzHaar-Xil-Mor, south-east in the mine.
text.es: Habla con TzHaar-Xil-Mor, al sureste en la mina.

chatOptions: 3 How can I make the story better?
1 The criminal could be a TzHaar-Xil.

text.en: Speak to TzHaar-Hur-Brekt.
text.es: Habla con TzHaar-Hur-Brekt.

text.en: Speak to TzHaar-Xil-Mor.
text.es: Habla con TzHaar-Xil-Mor.

chatOptions: 3 How can I make the story better?

text.en: Speak to TzHaar-Hur-Brekt.
text.es: Habla con TzHaar-Hur-Brekt.

chatOptions: 3 They are all happy with the plot.

text.en: Speak with TzHaar-Ket-Jok, south-west in the mine.
text.es: Habla con TzHaar-Ket-Jok, al suroeste en la mina.

chatOptions: 2 What do you think of your current role?
3 We should modify your current role.

text.en: Speak with TzHaar-Xil-Mor.
text.es: Habla con TzHaar-Xil-Mor.

chatOptions: 2 What do you think of your current role?

text.en: Speak with TzHaar-Hur-Klag.
text.es: Habla con TzHaar-Hur-Klag.

chatOptions: 2 What do you think of your current role?
3 We should modify your current role.

text.en: Speak with TzHaar-Mej-Kol.
text.es: Habla con TzHaar-Mej-Kol.

chatOptions: 3 We should modify your current role.

text.en: Finally speak to TzHaar-Hur-Brekt. You will need to make 17 stone pillars in total, but not all at once (there isn't enough space for 17 pillars and 14 planks.)
text.es: Finalmente habla con TzHaar-Hur-Brekt. Necesitarás fabricar 17 pilares de piedra en total, pero no todos a la vez (no hay suficiente espacio para 17 pilares y 14 tablones).

chatOptions: 2 Yes, all roles have been given out.

text.en: Mine the Stone slab vein and craft 4 pillars for the first cave section (you can easily return for more).
text.es: Extrae la veta de Stone slab y fabrica 4 pilares para la primera sección de la cueva (puedes volver fácilmente por más).

text.en: 14 oak planks (bank at Fight Cauldron or the Main Plaza if needed, or store them in a plank box)
text.es: 14 oak planks (guárdalos en el banco de Fight Cauldron o la Main Plaza si es necesario, o guárdalos en una plank box)

text.en: Go to the quest start location and have your planks treated by the small TzHaar-Hur-Frok. .
text.es: Ve al lugar de inicio de la misión y haz que el pequeño TzHaar-Hur-Frok trate tus tablones.

chatOptions: 1 Can you treat these oak planks for me?

text.en: Magic weapon with runes for water spells, ranged weapon with more distance than just darts, enough pillars and planks for a cave section (there are checkpoints.)
text.es: Arma mágica con runas para hechizos de agua, arma de distancia con más alcance que solo darts, suficientes pilares y tablones para una sección de la cueva (hay puntos de control).

text.en: Enter the crack in the south wall by TzHaar-Ket-Grol.
text.es: Entra en la grieta de la pared sur junto a TzHaar-Ket-Grol.

text.en: The first cave requires 6 treated planks and 4 pillars. After fixing the cave-ins, mine the blocked tunnel and proceed to the next checkpoint.
text.es: La primera cueva requiere 6 tablones tratados y 4 pilares. Después de reparar los derrumbes, extrae el túnel bloqueado y avanza hasta el siguiente punto de control.

text.en: The second cave requires 6 treated planks and 6 pillars. The fire monster can only be harmed by magic with water spells or necromancy.
text.es: La segunda cueva requiere 6 tablones tratados y 6 pilares. Al monstruo de fuego solo se le puede hacer daño con magia usando hechizos de agua o con nigromancia.

text.en: The third cave requires 2 treated planks and 7 pillars. The first two lava monsters can only be harmed by ranged weapons with an attack range of 5 spaces or higher or by using necromancy. You will need to use magic with water spells or necromancy on the final fire monster. You cannot cross the stones before killing all three lava monsters.
text.es: La tercera cueva requiere 2 tablones tratados y 7 pilares. A los dos primeros monstruos de lava solo se les puede hacer daño con armas de distancia con un alcance de ataque de 5 espacios o más, o usando nigromancia. Necesitarás usar magia con hechizos de agua o nigromancia en el monstruo de fuego final. No puedes cruzar las piedras antes de matar a los tres monstruos de lava.

text.en: Adamant pickaxe or better in your inventory or tool belt, full melee or hybrid armour
text.es: Adamant pickaxe o mejor en tu inventario o cinturón de herramientas, armadura completa de melé o híbrida

text.en: Once you are ready to fight the TokTz-Ket-Dill, enter the tunnel to the north.
text.es: Cuando estés listo para luchar contra el TokTz-Ket-Dill, entra en el túnel hacia el norte.

text.en: If you die, your gravestone will appear in the chamber with the trapped TzHaar-Hurs, outside the tunnel to the TokTz-Ket-Dill.
text.es: Si mueres, tu lápida aparecerá en la cámara con los TzHaar-Hurs atrapados, fuera del túnel hacia el TokTz-Ket-Dill.

text.en: Kill the TokTz-Ket-Dill by breaking it's armour with a pickaxe equipped, then using any style to finish it off. Do not use prayers until the shell is broken.
text.es: Mata al TokTz-Ket-Dill rompiendo su armadura con un pickaxe equipado, y luego usando cualquier estilo para acabar con él. No uses oraciones hasta que se rompa el caparazón.

text.en: After killing the TokTz-Ket-Dill, exit to the north, head south out of the caves, and then talk to any of the three starting TzHaar to finish the quest.
text.es: Después de matar al TokTz-Ket-Dill, sal hacia el norte, dirígete al sur para salir de las cuevas, y luego habla con cualquiera de los tres TzHaar iniciales para terminar la misión.
